## Documentation Improvement
Which part of the documentation is unclear or missing? (e.g., Installation, CRD Reference, Tutorial)

## Location
Provide a link to the page or file in the repo.

## Suggested Change
Describe the update. If it is a technical correction (e.g., wrong `kubectl` command), please provide the correct version.

## Reason for Change
Why is the current documentation insufficient? (e.g., "The Helm install instructions are missing the namespace creation step").
